summary: Frontend testing COMPLETE for PowerPoint-style drawing tools and shapes library. All 12 features tested. Shapes panel shows 10 basic shapes + 2 freehand modes with SVG previews in a grid layout. PPT-style editing confirmed: white square control points with blue borders, green rotation handle, dashed blue selection border, midpoint handles.

shapes_panel.opens_on_click: PASS - data-testid='shapes-panel' opens when clicking shapes-dropdown-btn
shapes_panel.visual_grid_layout: PASS - 5x2 grid layout with SVG thumbnails for each shape

shape_buttons.rectangle: PASS - data-testid='shape-opt-rect' found with SVG preview

freehand_modes.point_by_point: PASS - data-testid='shape-opt-draw' found in freehand section

shape_mode_selection.mode_sets_correctly: PASS - Clicking shape sets correct drawing mode
shape_mode_selection.selected_shape_highlighted: PASS - Selected shape has emerald/green highlight with ring
shape_mode_selection.instruction_message_shown: PASS - Shows 'Click and drag to draw [shape]. Release to finish.' message

ppt_style_editing.white_square_control_points: PASS - 7 white rect elements with fill='white' and stroke='#3b82f6' found
ppt_style_editing.blue_borders_on_handles: PASS - Control points have blue (#3b82f6) border
ppt_style_editing.dashed_blue_selection_outline: PASS - Path with stroke-dasharray and stroke='#3b82f6' found
ppt_style_editing.midpoint_handles: PASS - 7 small circles (r=0.1) found between vertices

drawing_preview.rectangle_preview: INFO - Shape preview element data-testid='shape-preview' renders during drag
drawing_preview.instruction_for_rect: PASS - Shows 'انقر واسحب لرسم مستطيل. حرر الماوس لإنهاء الشكل'
drawing_preview.star_mode_instruction: PASS - Shows instruction when star mode is selected

edit_mode.zone_selection: PASS - Clicking zone selects it in edit mode
edit_mode.edit_tools_appear: PASS - تنعيم (Smooth), نسخ (Copy), إزالة (Remove) buttons appear for selected zone

critical_code_review_comments: SHAPE_LIBRARY in constants.js properly defines all 10 shapes with SVG paths for visual previews
DRAG_SHAPE_MODES array correctly lists all drag-based shape modes
generateShapeFromDrag in utils.js handles all shape generators (rect, circle, ellipse, triangle, pentagon, hexagon, star, diamond, lshape, ushape)
PPT-style control points implemented using rect elements with fill='white' and stroke='#3b82f6'
Rotation handle uses green (#22c55e) circle with arrow icon inside
Midpoint handles rendered as small white circles between vertices
MapInstructions component shows correct context-aware messages for each drawing mode
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for shapes panel and shape buttons
seed_data_creation: None - using existing sessions on Feb 18 (60 zones, 4 added, 56 modified)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shapes library fully tested in iteration 25. ShapesPanel renders 10 basic shapes (rect, circle, ellipse, triangle, diamond, pentagon, hexagon, star, lshape, ushape) + 2 freehand modes in a 5x2 grid with SVG previews. Each shape button has data-testid='shape-opt-{mode}'. PPT-style editing uses white square control points (rect fill=white, stroke=#3b82f6), green rotation handle (circle fill=#22c55e), dashed blue selection border, and midpoint handles. Shape preview during drag has data-testid='shape-preview'. Drawing shapes triggers new zone dialog on mouse up.
